rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit type declarations in AGREE equations to match AADL data types.
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions.
Write range assumptions using named constants or visible variables.
Ensure that output guarantees relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees must be syntactically valid AGREE expressions.
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL timing properties like Deadline or Period directly in AGREE expressions.
Do not assume Boolean ports can be treated as integers without explicit scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and component implementation binding rules
